property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. For the remainder of Combat, you do not discard any cards from your Life Deck from your opponent's card effects except for damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Namekian Tokui-Waza, this card does an additional +3 life cards of damage and is shuffled into your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control. Stops a physical attack. If your opponent has no Drills in play, your attacks gain "if successful, your opponent discards the top 3 cards of his Life Deck" for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control. Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If your opponent has no Non-Combat cards in play, your attacks gain "Raise either your or your opponent's anger 1 level" for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent did not, name a Non-Dragon Ball card. Your opponent searches his Life Deck for 1 copy of that card and removes it from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your current anger level. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. If your opponent has no Non-Combat cards in play, your attacks gain "If successful, your opponent's Main Personality loses 3 power stages" for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. When you perform this attack, you may remove 3 Commons in your discard pile from the game to make this a focused attack and lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your Main Personality's PUR - 1. Stops a physical attack. Your Main Personality's PUR gains -Y until the end of your next turn. Y = your Main Personality's current personality level. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your current anger level. Stops a physical or energy attack. Remove from the game after use. If your Main Personality's current personality level is 3 or higher, discard after use instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical or energy attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent did not, raise your anger 2 levels and shuffle this card into your Life Deck after use. Otherwise, remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Play immediately after a physical attack you perform becomes successful. Draw a card. Your opponent skips his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. During your next "Attacker Attacks" phase, you must perform an attack or pass.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for a Battleground and set it aside. At the beginning of your next turn, place the set aside Battleground into play. You do not have to skip the Combat Step of your next turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, when a Drill or Combat card increases the power stages or life cards of damage for any of your attacks, raise that amount by 1. Unless your Main Personality is Hercule, limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Heroes only. Physical attack doing +4 life cards of damage. If performed against a Majin, your opponent discards the top 3 cards of his Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use immediately after an energy attack you perform becomes successful. Discard up to 3 of your opponent's Allies in play. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent did not, search your Life Deck for up to 2 Orange Style Drills and place them into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If either "Namek Dragon Ball 1" or "Namek Dragon Ball 2" is in play, all of your opponent's attacks cost +2 life cards to perform for the remainder of Combat. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. You may remove any amount of Commons in your discard pile from the game. For every 2 cards removed this way, discard one of your opponent's Drills in play. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your current anger level. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. When you perform this attack, you may choose for all the power stagfes of damage this attack would deal to become life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If either "Namek Dragon Ball 5" or "Namek Dragon Ball 6" is in play, your opponent cannot use Endurance for the remainder of Combat. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control. Stops a physical attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If your opponent's current anger level is 0 or 1, shuffle this card into your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. If either "Namek Dragon Ball 6" or "Namek Dragon Ball 7" is in play, remove up to 3 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play from the game. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your current anger level. Stops an energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If your opponent's current anger level is 0 or 1, remove the bottom 10 cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent did not, remove up to 2 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your Main Personality's PUR -1. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. When performing this attack, you may discard one of your Drills in play to make this a focused attack. You do not have to discard a Drill to make this a focused attack if your opponent's current anger level is 0 or 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent did not, your opponent discards the top 5 cards of his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage and +X life cards of damage. For X, consult the Physical Attack Table as if this were a physical attack. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. When you perform this attack, you may remove 3 Commons in your discard pile from the game to raise your anger 2 levels and have your Main Personality gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. For the remainder of Combat, any of your opponent's card effects that prevent you from using your cards no longer affect your ability to use them. This power does not affect the costs of card powers. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. When you perform this attack, you may discard a card to double the Base Damage for this attack from the Physical Attack Table.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Use only if your opponent performed a physical attack that was successful during his previous "Attacker Attacks" phase. Physical attack doing +6 power stages and +1 life cards of damage. Raise your and your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may search your Life Deck for a card with the word "Knee" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, if your opponent stops a physical attack performed by your Main Personality, your opponent must skip his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may search your Life Deck for a card with the word "Throw" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: If a card has a cost in power stages or life cards the cost is doubled after any other modifiers are applied.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage. If successful and either "Namek Dragon Ball 4" or "Namek Dragon Ball 5" is in play, search your Life Deck for a Namek Dragon Ball and place it into play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you stop an attack, you may place the bottom card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. You may remove a "Black Fore Fist Punch" in your discard pile from the game. If you do, raise your anger 2 levels, and for the remainder of Combat, prevent 3 power stages of damage from every attack your opponent performs.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent has used a Combat card earlier this Combat, your opponent cannot play Combat cards that do not stop attacks until the end of your next turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent does not have any Drills in play, all of your attacks gain "If you have 2 Black Style Drills in play, this is a focused attack" for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If your opponent controls 3 or more Dragon Balls in play, capture a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may remove a "Blue Round Throw" in your discard pile from the game to gain 3 power stages and make this a focused attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. Reveal the top 3 cards of your Life Deck to all players. Your opponent chooses 1 of those cards. The chosen card is placed into your hand, and the other 2 are placed back in any order. If your Main Personality's level is 3 or higher, you get to choose the card instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Saiyan Tokui-Waza, your Dragon Balls cannot be captured for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you prevent power stages or life cards of damage from an attack, you may prevent 1 more damage of that type. This also affects Endurance.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent has used a Combat card earlier this Combat, place the bottom 2 cards of your Life Deck into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If performed against a Rogue Personality or Majin, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Heroes only. Damage from your attacks cannot be prevented by Endurance.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat, whenever an energy attack you perform becomes successful, prevent 3 life cards of damage from every attack your opponent performs for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin Dabura only. Remove an Ally in play from the game. Unless your opponent discards a card from his hand when the Ally is removed, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your energy attacks do a minimum of 6 life cards of damage after modifiers. Power stages of damage are not affected and count as 0 life cards for this effect.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever an attack you perform becomes successful, you may place the bottom card of your discard pile under this Drill face down. During your Power Up Step, you may discard any cards placed under this Drill. For each card discarded this way, your Main Personality gains 1 power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, you may not perform a Final Physical Attack, but you can discard a card from your hand to perform a physical attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may search your Life Deck for a card with the word "Left" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may search your Life Deck for a card with the word "Flight" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Hercule may use Villains only cards. Once per Combat during your "Attacker Attacks" phase, you may discard the top card of your Life Deck to have Hercule perform a focused physical attack doing 7 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering Combat, search your Life Deck for any non-personality card with "Majin" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: You must have performed 2 successful physical attacks in this Combat to use this card. Raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When your opponent takes life cards of damage, you may place a card in your discard pile under this Drill facedown. If you have 4 cards under this Drill during your Non-Combat Step, you may remove this Drill and any cards under it from the game to search your Life Deck for a level 3 Ally and place it in play at 3 power stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped attack performed against you each Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use immediately after a physical attack you perform becomes successful. Discard up to 3 of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use when you stop an energy attack. Raise your Main Personality to its highest power stage. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, whenever you perform a physical attack that has no damage modifiers on the card, the attack does an additional +2 life cards of damage and is a focused attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use when your opponent's Main personality gains power stages outside of the Power Up Step. Your Main Personality gains double the amount of power stages. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If successful, remove any 3 cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Spin Kick: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Remove the top card of your opponent's discard pile from the game. If successful and you have more cards in your discard pile than your opponent, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Evil Menace: Search your Life Deck for a Majin and place it into play at 3 power stages above 0. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +1 power stages of damage. If successful, raise your anger 1 level. This card stays in play to be used one more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may search your Life Deck for a card with the word "Power" in the title and place it into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (X = Your opponent's MP's printed PUR) Constant Combat Power: All of your focused attacks do +2 life cards of damage and gain "If successful, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (X = Your opponent's MP's printed PUR) Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. You and your opponent's Main Personality switch the number of power stages each of your Scouters are above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Corruption: Energy attack. Take control of one of your opponent's Allies in play. That Ally is now your Majin villain Ally until he leaves play. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When you perform a physical attack with a Named or Styled card, you may discard a card from your hand to make it a focused physical attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. If you declared Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Blue Tokui-Waza, this is a focused attack that does +6 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your Main Personality's PUR -1. Stops a physical attack. For the remainder of Combat, whenever you use Endurance, you do not have to remove the card with Endurance from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. You may remove a "Power Up the Most" in your discard pile from the game. If you do, raise your anger 1 level and remove one of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent has used a Combat card earlier this Combat, raise your anger 2 levels, and search your Life Deck for an Orange Style Drill and place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage. If successful and your opponent has more Non-Combat cards in play than you, your opponent discards 1 Non-Combat card at a time until his number of Non-Combat cards in play equal yours.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Both players reveal the top card of their Life Decks. The player who reveals the highest numbered card places the revealed card into his hand. The other player, or both players if there is a tie, shuffle the revealed card back into his Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful and "Namek Dragon Ball 2" is in play, raise your anger 3 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering Combat, you may reveal any number of cards that perform physical attacks in your hand to all players. For the remainder of Combat, all of your physical attacks do +3 power stages of damage for each card revealed from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You may remove a "Hidden Power Level" in your discard pile from the game. If you do, this is a focused attack and you raise your anger 1 level and lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, you may discard a card from your hand and have your Main Personality pay 2 power stages him perform a physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If your opponent's current anger is 0 when you use this Drill, gain 2 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. When you use a card effect to discard any Allies in play, you draw a card and discard 1 additional Ally, if possible.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, you may remove 4 Uncommons in your discard pile from the game for your Main Personality to gain 2 power stages at the beginning of each of your "Attacker Attacks" phases for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent has used a Combat card earlier this Combat, this card stays on the table to be used 2 more times this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent has used a Combat card earlier this Combat, this attack is a focused attack with damage that cannot be prevented, and you raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Stops a physical attack. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared a Black Tokui-Waza, your opponent's Main Personality loses 6 power stages, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may remove a "Saiyan Energy Throw" in your discard pile from the game to draw a card and have this attack do an additional +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If either "Namek Dagon Ball 2" or "Namek Dragon Ball 3" is in play, prevent 3 life cards of damage from all attacks your opponent performs for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Vegeta and Majin Vegeta only. Attach this card to a "Vegeta's Quickness Drill". While this card is attached, you may draw the bottom card of your discard pile when entering Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If performed against a Majin, this is a focused attack doing an additional +4 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Any damage modifiers from your Drills are doubled for this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin Babidi only. Use whenever a card you just played creates an effect that lasts for the remainder of Combat. That effect now lasts until the end of your next turn instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Discard one of your opponent's Non-Combat cards or Allies in play. Unless your opponent discards a card from his hand when you perform this attack, remove an additional Non-Combat card or Ally in play from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Choose 2 cards in your discard pile and place them on top of your Life Deck. Stops an energy attack performed against you during your opponent's next "Attacker Attacks" phase. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove 5, 9, or 2 cards in your discard pile from the game. Choose up to the same amount of Combat cards in your opponent's discard pile and remove them from the game. Draw a card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All Gohan Named cards in your Life Deck that do not have Endurance gain Endurance 3.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw 2 cards. Place the bottom 2 cards of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when your opponent would win by the Survivial Victory. Shuffle the top 4 cards of your discard pile into your Life Deck. Using this card prevents the Survival Victory but cannot be used in Tuff Enuff. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Heroes only. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If performed against Vegeta, Frieza, King Cold, Android 20, Cell, Majin Babidi, or Majin Buu, this is a focused attack and does an additional +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may remove this card from the game to make your opponent skip his first "Attacker Attacks" phase of that Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach this card to your Main Personality. While attached, your Main Personality can use Majin only cards and is considered a Majin for other card powers.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +1 life cards of damage for each card in your opponent's removed from the game pile.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (X = Your opponent's MP's printed PUR.) Constant Combat Power: When entering Combat, choose 3 cards that can perform focused attacks in your discard pile, and shuffle them back into your Life Deck. For each card you shuffle in this way, Majin Yakon gains 1 power stage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 life cards of damage for each Majin in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your Main Personality's PUR - 1. Physical attack doing +1 power stages of damage. Choose up to 3 of your Drills in play. The chosen Drills cannot be discarded or removed from the game for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Your opponent may not use personality powers and Constant Combat Powers for the remainder of Combat. If your opponent's current anger level is 0, this attack cannot be prevented. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your attacks do +1 life cards of damage for each card you have drawn this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Use whenever your opponent uses a card effect to draw a card. Draw 2 cards. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, discard a Non-Combat card or Ally in play. If either "Namek Dragon Ball 3" or "Namek Dragon Ball 4" is in play, this attack stays on the table to be used X more times this Combat. X = Your Main Personality's current level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Stops a physical attack. You may remove any amount of cards in your discard pile with the word "Sword" in the title from the game. The next attack you perform this Combat that is not unstoppable or focused does +1 life cards of damage for every card removed this way.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 life cards of damage. When performing this attack, you may remove 3 cards in your discard pile from the game with "Majin" in the title to make this a focused attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All phsyical attacks you perform with "Majin" in the title to +3 power stages of damage and are focused attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. For the remainder of Combat, prevent 2 power stages of damage from all of your opponent's physical attacks, and all your physical attacks gain "Raise your anger 1 level. Damage from this attack cannot be prevented." Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If your opponent's current anger level is 0, reveal the top 8 cards of your discard pile or Life Deck. If your opponent's current anger is not 0, reveal the top 5 cards of your discard pile. This attack does +1 life cards of damage for each Red Style card found with this effect.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever your Main Personality advances a level, none of your other Drills are discarded. If your opponent's current anger level is 0 when your Main Personality advances a level, this Drill is not discarded either.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level and gain 1 power stage. This attack stays on the table to be used one more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when you perform an attack that is not unstoppable or focused. Draw a card. You may discard any number of cards from your hand; for each card you discard, the attack you are performing does an additional +3 life cards of damage. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck only. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. Damage from this attack cannot be prevented. Draw a card and raise your anger 1 level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After drawing your cards during the "Defender Draws 3 Cards" phase, you may shuffle your hand into your Life Deck and draw the same amount of cards into your hand.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: Ultra Rare

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. For the remainder of Combat, Majin vegeta gains 2 power stages whenever you play a card with "Majin" in the title.

property.name: Rarity
property.value: Ultra Rare

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +7 power stages of damage. If performed against a Rogue Personality, this attack does an additional +4 life cards of damage. If the Rogue Personality is a villain, this is a focused attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = the number of Dragon Balls you control. Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage. Gain 4 power stages. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your Main Personality's PUR - 1. Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage and an additional +1 power stages of damage for each card in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If "Earth Dragon Ball 1" or "Earth Dragon Ball 2" is in play, this attack does +1 life cards of damage for each Blue Style Drill you have in play. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, look at the top 2 cards of your Life Deck. You may place both cards either on top or on the bottom of your Life Deck in any order.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. You can use this card to stop a physical or energy attack instead by removing 3 Rares in your discard pile from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance X. X = your current anger level. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Any "If successful" effects that raise your anger level or lower your opponent's anger level are secondary effects for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If you declared a Tokui-Waza and your opponent declared an Orange Tokui-Waza, this card stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. When used a 2nd time it reads "Stops an energy attack" instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. You cannot win by the Most Powerful Personality Victory this turn. You may remove 5 Uncommons in your discard pile from the game to have your Main Personality advance 1 personality level, and at the end of Combat, your Main Personality loses 1 personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin Babidi only. Discard an Ally in play. That Ally's controller discards the top 5 cards of his Life Deck. Draw a card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat, whenever you use Endurance, you may place the bottom card of your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck, and your Main Personality gains 2 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. You must discard an energy combat card from your hand to use this card. You and your opponent reveal the top 3 cards of your Life Decks. The player who reveals the lowest amount of Energy Combat cards discards the top 4 cards of his Life Deck. No one discards if a tie occurs.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Use when one of your opponent's Allies is discarded from play. All of your opponent's personalities lose 3 power stages. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever your opponent uses a card effect to discard any of your Allies he must discard this Ally before discarding any others. Jewel does not have to take over Combat to use this power.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Majin only. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, your opponent's Main Personality loses 4 power stages to a minimum of 0, and your opponents cannot play Combat cards for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for a Battleground or Location that is not in play and place it in play. When Combat ends shuffle that Battleground or Location back into your Life Deck. This effect does not remove any Battleground or Location in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, a player may remove the bottom 3 cards of his discard pile from the game to shuffle the top 2 cards of his discard pile into his Life Deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of Combat, you may discard Life Cards instead of paying power stages for game effects, you cannot discard more life cards from your Life Deck than that personality could pay for the cost. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: During Combat, you may discard a card from your hand to stop a non-focused attack. For the remainder of Combat, you must pass during every phase of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. If you have at least 2 other Allies in play with "Android" in the title, this attack does +4 life cards of damage instead, and you raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Nothing can raise your anger except this Constant Combat Power. If Android 13 is your Main Personality, you may remove 2 Allies you control with "Android" in the title from the game to advance a personality level. All of your physical attacks do +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. Your opponent skips his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. During your next "Attacker Attacks" phase, Android 13 must perform a focused physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage, if possible.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If another personality you control with "Android" in the title performed an attack during your previous "Attacker Attacks" phase, this power can be used a second time this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If you have Android 14 in play, this attack does an additional +4 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. If you have Android 14 in play, this attack does 15 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Android 14 may take control of Combat and use this Constant Combat Power even if your Main Personality is not at 0 or 1 above 0. While he is in control of Combat, you may discard a card from your hand to have Android 14 perform a physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. Costs 6 power stages to perform. If performed by a Main Personality with "Android" in the title and you have at least 2 Allies in play with "Android" in the title, discard all of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If the only cards you have in play have "Android" in the title, this attack does +1 life card of damage for each card with "Android" in the title that you have in play. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If performed by a Main Personality with "Android" in the title, search your Life Deck for any card with "Android" in the title except "Android 13's Prepared Stance" and place it into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you stop an attack, you may shuffle the bottom card of your discard pile into your Life Deck. If that card is a Goku Named card gain 3 power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 1. This attack must be performed by a personality with "Android" in the title. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. If successful, your opponent must skip his next "Attacker Attacks" phase. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. If successful, search your Life Deck for any Location and place it into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If performed by Android 14, this attack stays in play to be used one more time this Combat. If performed against Goku, this attack does +5 power stages of damage instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, discard a card. If that card is a Gohan Named card, name a Styled card. Your opponent searches his Life Deck for a copy of that card and discards it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If your opponent declared a Tokui-Waza, this attack does an additional +2 life cards of damage for each Dragon Ball your opponent controls.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when you perform an attack. Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Your next attack does +X power stages of damage, where X = the number of power stages you gained by this card, to a maximum of an additional +5. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when one of your Allies is discarded or removed from the game. Any Allies being discarded or removed stay in play. End Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Goku only. Energy attack doing 12 life cards of damage. Costs 5 power stages to perform. Discard all Non-Combat cards in play. You must pass in all the remaining phases of Combat. If stopped, lower your Main Personality to 0 and for the remainder of Combat, your Allies cannot take ober Combat. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. If you have at least 3 Allies in play with "Android" in the title, raise your anger 2 levels and stop all physical attacks your opponent performs for the remainder of combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If performed by a Main Personality with "Android" in the title and the only personalities you have in play have "Android" in the title, this attack does +1 life cards of damage for each personality you control with "Android" in the title to a maximum of an additional +12 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Sensei Deck. Heroes only. Physical attack doing +2 power stages and +2 life cards of damage. If this attack is performed against a Villain, it does +4 power stages and +4 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Defense Shield: Stops the first 2 unstopped physical attacks performed on you during Combat. If you declared a Tokui-Waza, this Defensive Shield stops the first unstopped physical attack performed against you during Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Any attacks you perform with "Sword" in the title do +2 life cards of damage. If you have Trunks in play, his PUR is increased by 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Android 18 only. Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you have at leeast 1 Defense Shield in play, and none of your Defense Shields have been used this Combat, this attack stays on the table to be used 1 more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Android 16 only. Android 16 only. Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. If successful, your opponent discards the top card of his Life Deck at the beginning of each of his "Attacker Attacks" phases for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 4. Use during your "Defender Defends" phase. If your personality currently in control of Combat has "Android" in the title, all cards in your Life Deck without Endurance gain "Endurance 3" until the beginning of your next "Attacker Attacks" phase.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Android 17 only. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may raise your anger by up to 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: If your Main Personality has "Android" in the title, choose one of your Allies with "Android" in the title. For the remainder of Combat, even if your Main Personality is not at 0 or 1 above 0. You may take a personality with "Android" in the title that is removed from the game and place him into play at 3 power stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 2. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If you have at least 2 personalities in play with "Android" in the title, raise your anger 1 level and shuffle this card back into your Life Deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Android 19 only. Stops a physical attack. Search your Life Deck for an Orange Style card and place it into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. For the remainder of Combat, and attacks performed by your personalities with "Android" in the title cannot be prevented.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. You may discard an Ally with "Android" in the title that's not performing this attack to have this attack do an additional +2 life cards of damage and make this a focused attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Shuffle all cards in your hand back into your Life Deck and draw the same amount of cards. Draw a card. If you have at least 3 personalities in play with "Android" in the title, you may draw an additional card. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.
